programme.title: Seven's National News At Noon
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Seven News With Alex Cullen
programme.desc: Join Alex Cullen for all the latest news headlines, as he kicks off Seven's Winning Arvo featuring an entertaining lineup of quiz shows and news updates every hour.

programme.title: Beat The Chasers UK
programme.desc: Contestants try to beat five chasers in order to win cash and bragging rights.

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp presents the quiz, with Coronation Street's Faye Brookes, Hollyoaks' Richard Blackwood, Natalie Anderson from Emmerdale, and EastEnders' John Partridge.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Four contestants go into battle against the Chaser as they try to win thousands of pounds. However, standing in the way is their common enemy, the Chaser, one of the finest quiz brains in the UK.

programme.title: Seven News At 4
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin runs into Bree and Remi, desperate to get a message to Theo. Remi agrees, as long as Justin shows up to help Kirby through her songwriting stumbles and Justin agrees.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A car thief is hitting speeds of 190 kilometres per hour and police need to catch him before he reaches a school zone just as class is getting out. A golfer rides the streets in his golf buggy.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Street racers reach 192km/h. Hot and bothered with a van full of flames. A breakdown causes chaos in the Waterview Tunnel.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The semi-finals are here! Who will impress and progress, and who will be going home as superstar judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and KSI seek out the next big thing?

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: Code Blue: One Punch Killers
programme.desc: Explores the issue of one-punch killings after there were a reported 82 deaths of this type across the UK over the past five years. With rare access to detectives, we look at three cases in detail.

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: A patient's treatment plan takes an unexpected turn when Max (Ryan Eggold) gets overly invested. Meanwhile, Reynolds (Jocko Sims) celebrates his birthday with some help from the hospital and Kapoor (Anupam Kher) grapples with a case that hits close to home.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Sunrise Early News
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Edwina Bartholomew for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: Sunrise
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Natalie Barr and Matt Shirvington for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: Sunrise
programme.desc: Wake up to a better breakfast with Natalie Barr and Matt Shirvington for all the latest news, sport and weather.

programme.title: The Morning Show
programme.desc: Join Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies each morning for a variety of segments on the latest news, entertainment and other hot topics.

programme.title: Seven's National News At Noon
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Sinister Sorority
programme.desc: An ambitious student forms a special bond with a girl from her sorority, but she's still unaware of what her new friend is hiding.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Steve from Bath, Lisa from Maidenhead, Kristian from Cardiff and Bethany from Northampton join forces in the hope that their four brains can beat one, but that one brain does happen to belong to a Chaser...

programme.title: Seven News At 4
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: The Chase Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Larry Emdur, The Chase is a general knowledge race where players must ensure they stay one step ahead of the Chaser, some of the finest quiz brains in Australia. The Chase is on...

programme.title: Seven News
programme.desc: Seven News live coverage of local, national and international news, plus sport, finance and weather updates. Go to 7NEWS.com.au today for more live updates.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh's meeting viral sensation Nonna Fina and Maddie to cook up a storm. Adam has a great idea to help you display your kids' works of art. Colin's making poussin with Greek Salad.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender Special
programme.desc: We're heading deep into the Australian outback, starting in Queensland, heading into Alice Springs and the cruising the dramatic gorges around Katherine.

programme.title: Tower Heist
programme.desc: A luxury condo manager leads a staff of workers to seek payback on the Wall Street swindler who defrauded them in this hilarious comedy caper. With only days until the billionaire gets away with the perfect crime, the unlikely crew of amateur thieves enlists the help of petty crook Slide to steal the $20 million they're sure is hidden in the penthouse.

programme.title: TBA
programme.desc: TBA.

programme.title: Quacks
programme.desc: Caroline bags an invitation to meet her hero: Charles Dickens (Andrew Scott). William finds himself in an awkward position when he exaggerates how much of a fan he is (he hasn't read a single page). An excruciating evening ensues when William escorts Caroline to a dinner party at Dickens' house. Meanwhile, John finds himself with a new protégé when he takes an orphan under his wing, and Robert meets his match when a forthright, uppity young volunteer called Florence Nightingale (Milly Thomas) arrives at the hospital and starts interfering in his work. With Dr Hendrick (Rupert Everett) keen to curry favour with Nightingale and her influential family, Robert has to work out how to get rid of her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: The Morning Show - Weekend
programme.desc: Join Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies to catch up on all the highlights from this week's program, including a variety of segments on the latest news and entertainment.

programme.title: Seven's Horse Racing
programme.desc: Live coverage of horse racing every Saturday.
